chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-6486 of 2015 _________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ BEFORE: Justice Irfan Saadat Khan, Justice Agha Faisal,JJ 1. For hearing of CMA No.32640/2015 (Stay) 2. For hearing of Main Case.-.-. 23.11.2021 Mr. Abdul Rauf Malik, Advocate for the Petitioners. Syed Hussain Shah, A.A.G. Sindh..--.--. Irfan Saadat Khan,J:- The petitioners are the employees of Sindh Small Industries Corporation. The only grievance of the petitioners is that they were not paid the salary for the months of May, June & September, 2015. Counsel for the petitioner states that under identical circumstances in C. P. No.D-3902/2016, the bench while hearing the matter disposed of the petition by order dated 08.10.2020 by directing the Respondents to pay the outstanding salaries. Since the facts of the present petition seems to be akin with the facts of the petitions bearing C. P. No.D-3902/2016 and 341/2017, we dispose of the instant petition also by directing the Respondents to pay the outstanding salary for the month of May, June & September, 2015, if any, in accordance with law within three months’ time from the date of receipt of this order and furnish compliance report with the MIT-II of this Court. With these directions the instant petition alongwith all the listed and pending applications, if any, stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
